description: This file defines an Astro.js plugin setup for a documentation website, including configuration hooks, static asset management, component auto-import, and sitemap filtering.

methods.name: bootstrap
methods.description: Main function that sets up and returns an array of Astro integrations, including configuration hooks, MDX support, and sitemap generation.

methods.name: bootstrap_auto_import
methods.description: Automatically imports components from specified directories, generates type definitions, and returns an auto-import configuration.

methods.name: cleanPublicDirectory
methods.description: Removes the public directory contents to prepare for static asset copying.

methods.name: copyBootstrap
methods.description: Copies the latest Bootstrap distribution into the static assets directory for versioned access.

methods.name: copyStatic
methods.description: Copies static assets from source to public directory, including handling version placeholders.

methods.name: aliasStatic
methods.description: Creates static file aliases by copying specific files to new paths.

methods.name: copyStaticRecursively
methods.description: Recursively copies static files and directories, replacing version placeholders.

methods.name: replacePathVersionPlaceholder
methods.description: Replaces '[version]' placeholder in paths with the current documentation version.

methods.name: sitemapFilter
methods.description: Filters pages for sitemap inclusion based on exclusion list.
